Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that accessories fit correctly on avatars, improving visual consistency.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Tracks the version of the codebase using a dynamic string for updates.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest features and fixes in the game.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic strings to include flipped timestamps for better formatting.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances the display of time-related information in a more readable format.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a quick reference to the current version of the codebase.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players benefit from the latest updates and bug fixes efficiently.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Improves the speed of converting timestamps to strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes time-related features load faster for players.

Added_Physics.name: FFlagHumanoidParentNil_Staged
Added_Physics.mechanism: Adjusts how humanoid objects are linked to their parent objects in the game.
Added_Physics.purpose: Fixes issues with character behavior, ensuring a more reliable gaming experience.
